title: Black Plastic Long Reach Grabber, 67 cm - Lightweight, Easy-to-Operate, Ideal for Indoor & Outdoor Use, 1 Piece
features: EXTENDED REACH CONVENIENCE: Measuring 67cm in length, this black long reach grabber allows you to easily retrieve objects from high shelves, the ground, and other hard-to-reach places without bending or stretching.
LIGHTWEIGHT YET DURABLE: Crafted from high-quality plastic, our grabber is not only light to carry and maneuver but also sturdy enough to handle daily use, both indoors and outdoors.
USER-FRIENDLY DESIGN: Featuring an easy-to-operate trigger mechanism, this grabber is designed for simplicity and comfort, making it accessible for users of all ages and abilities.

VERSATILE APPLICATION: Whether you're picking up litter, fetching items in tight spaces, or avoiding strain on your back and knees, this grabber is ideal for a variety of tasks around the home, garden, or workplace.

PRACTICAL TOOL FOR EVERYONE: From seniors seeking a helping hand around the house to outdoor enthusiasts committed to keeping our environment clean, this long-reach grabber is a must-have accessory for making life easier and more convenient.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality handy long reach grabber measures 67cm in length and is complete with an easy-to-operate trigger action. Safety Warning No warning applicable
